name: Zara Forgemender
sd_appearance: Warforged Zara Forgemender, a towering figure with intricate gears etched across her metallic form, moves with a rhythmic creak in the dimly lit Undercity cathedral. Her deep, haunting blue eyes, a stark contrast to her cold exterior, hold a fierce determination as they scan the forge. Wearing a suit of worn leather and chainmail, adorned with the scars of past contracts, she carries a warhammer and crossbow slung over her shoulder. A single, glowing ember nestled in her chestplate serves as a testament to her devotion to Brother Thane's Cult, casting an eerie, pulsating light upon her imposing silhouette.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
